instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `with-locked` that acquires a lock expression (evaluating it only once), runs body inside unwind-protect, and releases the lock even on non-local exit.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 MY-LOCK))
            (ACQUIRE-LOCK #:G1)
            (UNWIND-PROTECT (PROGN (WORK)) (RELEASE-LOCK #:G1)))
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 MY-LOCK))
            (ACQUIRE-LOCK #:G112)
            (UNWIND-PROTECT (PROGN (WORK)) (RELEASE-LOCK #:G112)))

--- stderr ---
